description: DGFT is the Government of India’s Directorate General of Foreign Trade, which manages importer-exporter registration and related foreign-trade services. Its online services include IEC verification and eBRC workflows for exporters.
summary: DGFT exposes two documented HTTP API surfaces for developers: an IEC verification API published via ApiSetu/OpenAPI and an eBRC integration API documented in DGFT PDFs; both require DGFT-issued credentials.
